message:
test(fuzz): add OfflineAccess + OfflineCapability arithmetic fuzz target (resolves y1wo2)

OfflineAccess (offline.rs:33-127) and OfflineCapability (158-262)
implement quantifiable offline-availability tracking that feeds repair
priority and pre-staging decisions. A regression that mis-classified
"Available" vs "Partial" either silently masks decode failure (read
DoS) or triggers unnecessary repair work.

Existing fcp-store fuzz coverage (store_validate_structure,
object_id_verifier, store_oti_roundtrip, store_coverage_eval) does NOT
touch this header-validation surface.

Seven properties:
- arithmetic round-trip add(n)+remove(n) preserves local_symbols
- status() ⇔ can_access() agreement: 3-way partition is total + disjoint
- coverage_bps boundary cases: 0 / =k / >k / k=0
- symbols_needed monotonicity under add
- bytes_needed == symbols_needed * symbol_size (u64 widening)
- OfflineCapability 3-way cardinality: avail+partial+not_cached==total
- OfflineCapability::readiness_bps direction: monotone non-decreasing
  under additions only

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) k=0 ⇒ coverage_bps=10000, can_access=true, status=Available
- (b) local=k=4 ⇒ coverage_bps exactly 10000
- (c) local=k-1=3, k=4 ⇒ Partial, symbols_needed=1, bytes_needed=64

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -554,5 +554,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_store_offline_access"
+path = "fuzz_targets/store_offline_access.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
